# Dependencies: Form 1040 Line 20 / Line 31 — Schedule 3 (2025)

> Authoritative source: `lines/20.md`. Re-authored 2026-06-14.
>
> **Implementation sites:**
> - `finalizeSchedule3Totals()` at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:26089` — aggregates Schedule 3 line 7 (sum of 6a..6z; G6 fix) and line 8 + Part II line 14 + line 15.
> - `computeLine20ThroughLine24()` at line 26942 — wires Form 1040 lines 20, 21, 22, 24.
> - Call site for finalize at `prepare()` line 2054; call site for line 20-24 at line 2060.
> - 17 `applyXxxToSchedule3()` methods populate individual credit fields BEFORE finalize runs.
>
> No MFS guard needed at the call site — transitive inheritance from each per-form audit (20 #1, 2026-05-14). Line 6c adoption credit implemented with CLW-B (G1 fix 2026-04-18). Line 6l Form 8978 negative BLOCKED on Form 8978 implementation.

---

| (reserved) | — | — | 6e | Always blank/zero (correctly omitted from sum) |

---

## 3. Conditional Inputs

| Condition | Input activated |
|---|---|
| Form 8978 line 14 < 0 | Routes negative portion to Schedule 3 line 6l (positive portion → Schedule 2 line 1z) |
| `hasFuelTaxCredit = true` (other-payments form) | Schedule 3 line 12 |
| `hasDeferred965Tax = true` (other-payments form) | Schedule 3 line 13d |
| 2+ employers with combined W-2 box 4 > $10,918.20 | Schedule 3 line 11 (excess SS withheld; 2025 SS wage base $176,100) |
| Adoption credit + Form 1116/2441/8863/8880 all present | CLW-B required for Schedule 3 line 6c |

---

## 4. Outputs

| Output field | Model | Type | Consumer |
|---|---|---|---|
| `TaxAndCredits.otherCreditsSchedule3` | `form1040.taxAndCredits` | `BigDecimal` | Form 1040 line 20 (null when 0) |
| `TaxAndCredits.totalCredits` | `form1040.taxAndCredits` | `BigDecimal` | Line 21 = nz(line 19) + nz(line 20) |
| `TaxAndCredits.taxAfterCredits` | `form1040.taxAndCredits` | `BigDecimal` | Line 22 = max(0, line 18 − line 21) (always-set; may be exact 0) |
| `TaxAndCredits.totalTax` | `form1040.taxAndCredits` | `BigDecimal` | Line 24 = line 22 + line 23 (TOTAL TAX FINAL) |
| `Payments.otherPaymentsSchedule3` | `form1040.payments` | `BigDecimal` | Form 1040 line 31 |
| `Schedule3` (full model) | `TaxReturnComputation.schedule3` | `Schedule3` | `form-tax-return-schedule3.component.ts` PDF fill |

---

## 5. CLW-A Consumers (Schedule 8812 Credit Limit Worksheet A)

`computeSchedule8812()` subtracts Schedule 3 nonrefundable credits at CLW-A line 2:

| CLW-A line | Java field read | Schedule 3 source |
|---|---|---|
| wA_2 | `nc.foreignTaxCredit` | line 1 |
| wA_3 | `nc.childDependentCareCredit` | line 2 |
| wA_4 | `nc.educationCredits` | line 3 — **must be set before `computeSchedule8812()`** (G1 order) |
| wA_5 | `nc.retirementSavingsContributionsCredit` | line 4 |
| wA_6 | `nc.elderlyDisabledCredit` | line 6d |
| wA_7 | `nc.amountFromForm8978Line14` | line 6l (always null — G2 open) |

**G6 open:** CLW-A subtracts 5 of 8 IRS-mandated Schedule 3 lines. Missing: 5b, 6f, 6, 6m (awaits Form 8396 / Form 5695 Part I / Form 8859 / Form 8936 alignment). Read-order: CLW-A reads individual Schedule 3 fields BEFORE `finalizeSchedule3Totals` runs (correct — finalize aggregates the same fields into line 8).

Note: line 13c (`netElectivePaymentElectionAmount`) has no PDF field mapping.

---

## 7. Compute Order

```text
prepare() flow (Schedule 3 portion):

1.  computeLine16()                                                                 at ~1192
2.  computeLine17() + wireLine17ToOutputs()                                         at 1621
3.  computeLine18() PRIMARY                                                         at 1653
4.  computeForm1116() + applyForeignTaxCreditToSchedule3()                          (Schedule 3 line 1)
5.  correctLine17ForFtc() → computeLine18() SECONDARY refresh                       (G-new-1)
6.  applyForm8863ToSchedule3()                                                      (★ G1 — BEFORE Schedule 8812)
                                                                                     + payments.americanOpportunityCredit pre-set
7.  computeLine27aEIC() → payments.earnedIncomeCredit pre-set                       (G1)
8.  Other apply...ToSchedule3() methods:
       finalizeForm2441PartII (line 2)
       applyForm8880ToSchedule3 (line 4)
       applyForm5695ToSchedule3 (lines 5a + 5b)
       applyForm8801ToSchedule3 (line 6b)
       applyScheduleRToSchedule3 (line 6d)
       applyForm8936ScheduleAToSchedule3 (lines 6f + 6m)
       applyForm8396ToSchedule3 (line 6g)
       applyForm8859ToSchedule3 (line 6h)
       applyForm8834ToSchedule3 (line 6i)
       applyForm8911ToSchedule3 (line 6j)
       applyForm8912ToSchedule3 (line 6k)
       applyOtherPaymentsFormToSchedule3 (lines 6z + 13b + 13z + 12 + 13d)
       applyPremiumTaxCreditToSchedule3 (line 9)
       applyForm4868ToSchedule3 (line 10)
       computeExcessSocialSecurityTax (line 11)
       applyForm2439CreditToSchedule3 (line 13a)
       applyAdoptionCredit (line 6c with CLW-B; ★ AFTER #4-7 prerequisites)
9.  computeSchedule8812()                                                           at 1817
       (reads nc.educationCredits at CLW-A line 2 — G1 order constraint)
10. finalizeSchedule3Totals(schedule3)                                              at 2054
       Schedule3.line7  = sum(6a, 6b, 6c, 6d, 6f, 6g, 6h, 6i, 6j, 6k, 6l, 6m, 6z)  (★ 13 fields; 6e omitted)
       Schedule3.line8  = line1 + line2 + line3 + line4 + line5a + line5b + line7
       Schedule3.line14 = sum(13a, 13b, 13c, 13d, 13z)
       Schedule3.line15 = line9 + line10 + line11 + line12 + line14
11. computeLine20ThroughLine24()                                                    at 2060
       line20 = (line8 > 0) ? line8 : null
       line21 = nz(line19) + nz(line20)
       line22 = max(0, line18 − line21)                                             (★ floor at 0)
       line23 = schedule2 Part II other taxes
       line24 = line22 + line23                                                     (TOTAL TAX FINAL)
```

**Three critical order constraints:**
1. `applyForm8863ToSchedule3` MUST run BEFORE `computeSchedule8812` (G1 — CLW-A line 2 reads `nc.educationCredits`).
2. `applyAdoptionCredit` MUST run AFTER Form 1116 / 2441 / 8863 / 8880 (CLW-B prerequisites).
3. ALL `applyXxxToSchedule3` methods MUST run BEFORE `finalizeSchedule3Totals` (finalize aggregates them).

---

## 8. Downstream Consumers

| Consumer | Method | How it uses line 20 / line 31 |
|---|---|---|
| Line 21 total credits | `computeLine20ThroughLine24()` | `line21 = nz(line19) + nz(line20)` |
| Line 22 tax after credits | `computeLine20ThroughLine24()` | `line22 = max(0, line18 − line21)` |
| Line 24 TOTAL TAX FINAL | `computeLine20ThroughLine24()` | `line24 = line22 + line23` |
| Schedule 8812 CLW-A | `computeSchedule8812()` | Reads individual Schedule 3 nc fields (BEFORE finalize) |
| Line 33 total payments | `computeLine31ThroughLine38()` | Includes line 31 in payments subtotal |
| PDF line 20 | `form-tax-return-1040.component.ts` | `values['line20_...'] = otherCreditsSchedule3` |
| PDF line 31 | `form-tax-return-1040.component.ts` | `values['line31_...'] = otherPaymentsSchedule3` |

---

## 9. 2025 Tax Constants

| Constant | 2025 value |
|---|---|
| Social Security wage base | $176,100 |
| Max employee SS tax per person | $10,918.20 (= 176,100 × 6.2%) |

Schedule 3 itself has no arithmetic thresholds; each input credit form carries its own caps and phaseouts (Form 1116 limit, Form 2441 income-based percentages, Form 8863 MAGI phaseouts, etc.).

---

## 10. Gaps

| # | Description | Severity | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| G1 | Adoption credit (line 6c) — CLW-B not implemented | MEDIUM | **Fixed 2026-04-18** |
| G2 | Form 8978 negative line 14 → line 6l — `amountFromForm8978Line14` never set | LOW | **BLOCKED** — requires Form 8978 BBA partnership implementation |
| G3 | Form 4136 fuel credit → line 12 — `creditForFederalTaxOnFuels` never set | LOW | **Fixed 2026-04-18** — manual entry on other-payments form |
| G4 | Line 13c (`netElectivePaymentElectionAmount`) never set; no PDF field | LOW | Out of scope (Form 3800) |
| G5 | Line 13d (`deferredNet965TaxLiability`) never set | LOW | **Fixed 2026-04-18** — manual entry |
| G6 | `totalOtherNonrefundableCredits` (line 7 PDF) = line 6z only, not sum(6a..6z) | MEDIUM | **Fixed 2026-04-18** — 13-field sum |
| G7 | Narrow E2E coverage — 5 scenarios; no multi-credit integration test | LOW | **Partial** — see outstanding.md |
| MFS guard | No MFS guard needed at orchestrator (transitive inheritance from per-form audits) | — | **Confirmed 2026-05-14** (20 #1) |
